scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c cyan,green --kill-others-on-fail "pnpm --filter @detaches/server dev" "node scripts/wait-for-server.mjs && pnpm --filter @detaches/web dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @detaches/shared build && pnpm --filter @detaches/server build && pnpm --filter @detaches/web build && pnpm --filter @detaches/cli build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @detaches/shared build && pnpm --filter @detaches/server typecheck && pnpm --filter @detaches/web typecheck && pnpm --filter @detaches/desktop build && pnpm --filter @detaches/cli typecheck
scripts.release:win: pnpm typecheck && pnpm build && pnpm --filter @detaches/openclaw-detaches-adapter test && pnpm --filter @detaches/server smoke && pnpm --filter @detaches/desktop package:win
